title: mirabilis bigelovii var. retrorsa
intro: Mirabilis bigelovii var. retrorsa, also known as the retrorse four o'clock, is a plant species belonging to the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Mirabilis bigelovii var. retrorsa include its potential in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antihistamine. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
